title: Pathing The Way
description: Allows you to change blocks using tools
body:
This mod allows you to use an assortment of tools to transform blocks into other blocks by right clicking as configured.

By default there's nothing configured.
In the config you can configure Shovel pathing, Pickaxe chiseling, Axe Stripping and Hoe Tilling.
You can also define if the behavior requires you to be sneaking.

The syntax for the conversion is as following: ``"domain:block,domain2:block2"``
For example: ``"minecraft:stone,minecraft:stone_stairs"`` would turn stone into stone stairs when right clicked with the tool of choice.
